title: Full cargo test --workspace and final validation
description:
What: Run full workspace test suite. Fix any compilation failures or test failures. Verify the guild/channel feature compiles and core tests pass.

Algorithm:
1. cargo test --workspace 2>&1 — record pass/fail count for each crate
2. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 2>&1 — record any new warnings
3. cargo fmt --workspace -- --check 2>&1 — run cargo fmt if needed

Known pre-existing failures: relay/tests/ and cli/tests/ may have compilation failures from the nie->agora rename (referencing nie_core etc.). These are pre-existing and NOT caused by this epic — report them but do not fix them in this bead.

Fix any new failures introduced by this epic's changes (guild.rs, protocol.rs, ws.rs, store.rs).

Also validate:
- grep -rn 'GROUP_CREATE\|GROUP_ADD\|GROUP_LIST\|GROUP_LEAVE\|GROUP_SEND' relay/src/ — should return 0 or only comment references
- grep -rn 'guild.create\|guild.list\|channel.create' relay/src/ — should return handler matches

Report:
- cargo test output for each crate (pass/fail counts)
- Clippy: clean or list of new issues
- The grep validation results
- Any new issues introduced by this epic (not pre-existing)
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p agora-core passes; cargo test -p agora-relay (lib unit tests) passes; cargo check --workspace exits 0; GROUP_* handlers removed from ws.rs
close_reason: cargo check --workspace clean; core 93/93 pass; relay lib 55/55 pass; integration test failures are pre-existing nie->agora rename artifacts
